description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a geometric, L-shaped layout with extensive floor-to-ceiling windows on all visible sides, maximizing natural light. The exterior is clad in dark gray brickwork, contrasted by white window frames and trim, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. A small balcony with a black metal railing and green artificial turf is visible on one side, providing outdoor space. The interior, partially visible through the large windows, includes open-plan rooms with light-colored flooring and minimalistic furnishings. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by large window panels, and a bay window projects from the front facade. The overall design emphasizes openness, transparency, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, L-shaped bungalow with flat roof, dark gray brick exterior, and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, featuring a balcony and bay window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, and extensive window panels, with a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with black railing and green turf, as well as grouped windows and a visible bedroom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the L-shaped structure, more grouped windows, and the balcony extending from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bay window, large window panels, and a clear look at the open, light-filled interior spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped floor-to-ceiling windows and bay window on front facade
